projects.title: Make.com | Blog post generator | WordPress
projects.description: Automated blog content generation system that creates, formats, and publishes articles to WordPress using AI and content workflows.

projects.title: Make.com | Automated Client Onboarding
projects.description: End-to-end onboarding system that guides new clients through questionnaires, document signing, and initial setup with minimal manual intervention.

projects.title: Make.com | Proposal generator | PandaDoc
projects.description: Automatic proposal creation system that pulls client data, creates customized proposals in PandaDoc, and tracks the approval process.

projects.title: Emergency Workflow Rescue — 50-Attorney Law Firm
projects.description: Critical system failure at a Miami law firm left 50 attorneys unable to access case files. Diagnosed root cause, recovered all data, deployed redundant automation safeguards, and established 24/7 monitoring — all within 90 minutes of the first call.

projects.title: Full-Stack Automation — Construction Company
projects.description: Designed and deployed an integrated automation suite for a Broward County construction company: automated client onboarding, document management workflows, and cloud-based project tracking replacing 3 manual spreadsheet processes.

projects.title: Automation + Infrastructure Integration — Accounting Firm
projects.description: Integrated solution combining network upgrade with automated client onboarding and document management workflows for a Miami Beach accounting firm. Resulted in 60% reduction in manual data entry.

projects.title: Multi-Agent AI System — Law Firm Intake Pipeline
projects.description: Deployed a 3-agent n8n orchestration system for a Broward County law firm: a triage agent that categorizes incoming inquiries, a research agent that pulls relevant case precedents, and a drafting agent that generates personalized intake packets. Reduced time-to-first-response from 48 hours to 11 minutes.

projects.title: Private LLM Deployment — Real Estate Company
projects.description: Set up a self-hosted Llama 3 instance on a private VPS for a Boca Raton real estate group. The model handles lease agreement review, tenant intake analysis, and automated maintenance ticket classification — all without exposing sensitive tenant data to third-party APIs.
